'''Tatavan Gordon''' was married to [[Herrit Gordon]], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] diplomat. When he was stationed on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], she picked up [[Bothese]] and became popular with the locals in the social circles in which the Gordons moved.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Krytos Trap (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
